pageTitle: MS - Weather Monitoring Platform by Michal Urban

hero.title: Weather Monitoring Platform
hero.subtitle: A full-stack weather monitoring solution built with modern web technologies. Real-time data visualization, interactive maps, and comprehensive forecasting.

about.title: About This Project
about.description: This weather monitoring platform demonstrates modern full-stack development practices, featuring real-time data processing, responsive design, and seamless user experience.

techStack.title: Built With Modern Technologies
techStack.description: This project showcases proficiency in cutting-edge web development tools and frameworks.

sveltekit.name: SvelteKit
sveltekit.description: Server-side rendering, file-based routing, and optimal performance

typescript.name: TypeScript
typescript.description: Type-safe code with enhanced developer experience

tailwind.name: Tailwind CSS
tailwind.description: Utility-first styling with custom design system

demo.title: Live Application Preview
demo.description: Explore the key features of the weather monitoring platform through these interactive demos.

features.title: Features

feature1.title: Real-time Measurements
feature1.description: Get live temperature and humidity data from your stations.

feature2.title: Weather Forecast
feature2.description: Detailed weather forecast for each of your stations.

feature3.title: Interactive Map
feature3.description: Visualize the location of your stations on a map.

features.overview_title: Everything you need for weather monitoring
features.overview_description: From real-time data collection to advanced forecasting, our platform provides all the tools you need for professional weather analysis.

real_time.title: Real-Time Data
real_time.description: Monitor temperature, humidity, pressure, wind speed, and more with live updates every second.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Comprehensive data analysis with trends, patterns, and statistical insights for informed decisions.

forecast.title: Weather Forecast
forecast.description: AI-powered forecasting with hourly, daily, and extended predictions based on your local data.

dashboard.title: Smart Dashboard
dashboard.description: Intuitive dashboard for managing sensors, viewing data, and configuring alerts with ease.

history.title: Historical Data
history.description: Access years of historical weather data with powerful search and filtering capabilities.

alerts.title: Smart Alerts
alerts.description: Customizable notifications for extreme weather conditions and threshold breaches.

locations.title: Multi-Location
locations.description: Monitor multiple weather stations and locations from a single unified interface.

mobile.title: Mobile Ready
mobile.description: Fully responsive design works perfectly on all devices and screen sizes.

export.title: Data Export
export.description: Export data in multiple formats including CSV, JSON, and PDF reports.

api.title: API Access
api.description: RESTful API for integrating weather data into your own applications and systems.

register.title: Ready to get started?
register.description: Register now and start monitoring your weather stations.
